nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 奈洛比
nodes.summary: 奈洛比是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Speke's weaver、Chestnut weaver，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 约翰·汉宁·斯皮克
nodes.summary: 约翰·汉宁·斯皮克是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Speke's weaver，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Speke's weaver
nodes.summary: Speke's weaver（Speke's weaver，学名 Ploceus spekei），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于奈洛比、约翰·汉宁·斯皮克，常见栖息地包括稀树草原。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Typical clutches comprise four eggs, which are unmarked deep blue, somewhat pointed at both ends, 24 to 26 mm long and 15 to 17 mm wide. Speke's weaver is found in northern and eastern Somalia, Ethiopia, Kenya (mostly the central highlands), and north-eastern Tanzania. It inhabits savanna, bush, agricultural land, and towns. In parts of its range it is common, notably the densely populated area of Nairobi and environs, where it visits bird feeders. This bird was named in honor of John Speke.{{cite book | last = Beolen | first = Bo |author2=Watkins, Michael | title = Whose Bird?
